name: Sunny Cocoa Drop Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C).
2. In a bowl, mix oil and sugar until well combined.
3. Add sour cream, vanilla extract, egg white, orange peel; stir until smooth.
4. In another bowl, combine flour, cocoa, baking soda, and baking powder; mix.
5. Gradually add dry ingredients to the wet mixture; blend until just combined.
6. Shape dough into small balls (about 1 inch) and place on a greased cookie sheet.
7. Bake for 10-12 minutes or until lightly golden brown.
8. Remove from oven and let cool on baking sheet for a few minutes before transferring to a wire rack.
9. To make the glaze, mix cocoa powder with a small amount of milk until smooth. Drizzle over cooled cookies.
Glaze: Mix cocoa powder with a little milk until smooth. Drizzle over cooled cookies.
